what: Generate vector embeddings for each entry using LLM
why: Transform knowledge text into vector representations for semantic search
output: Array of embedding vectors paired with their source entry IDs

success_handling.criteria: Embeddings are generated for all entries without exceeding error threshold

event.message: Vector embeddings generated for all entries

error_handling.criteria: Embedding API returns 5xx error or connection failure
error_handling.action: Retry up to 3 times with exponential backoff, abort if all retries fail

event.message: LLM API error during embedding generation: {error}

error_handling.action: Apply exponential backoff starting at 1s, retry up to 5 times

event.message: Rate limit hit during embedding generation, backing off

decisions.condition: Partial embeddings due to rate limit
decisions.outcome: Proceed with partial set, store what we have
